newsSince: No confirmed material company-specific news since June 9 (apparent Harmonic Drive merger/acquisition chatter traces to historical/aggregator items, not a new 2026 deal). Story unchanged: ~35% global share in RV reducers, real humanoid/cobot reduction-gear exposure, but well-discovered. Move since June 9 (+6%) is modest and sector-driven.

sources.label: Nabtesco precision reduction gears / robot business

verdicts.rankRationale: Genuine humanoid-actuation exposure via #1 RV-reducer position, but already well-discovered and only +6% since June 9 with no fresh catalyst. Rank stays consistent with evidence/risk-reward; no new humanoid order or capacity news to re-rate the alpha thesis.
verdicts.bull: Critical actuation chokepoint; RV-reducer capacity doubling positions it for humanoid volume.
verdicts.neutral: Real but well-known exposure; reducer content per humanoid still uncertain.
verdicts.bear: Industrial/auto cyclicality dominates near-term; humanoid revenue remains immaterial.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Named humanoid actuator design wins and capacity ramp
verdicts.primaryRisk: Industrial-robot cycle softness; humanoid timeline slips
